title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.3.0 — TAPE consolidation: new WEAR macro (one knob, fresh->worn) scales hysteresis/flutter/HF-loss + drives dropouts (GRIT v5; old presets unchanged). Validate the WEAR feel by ear and check GRIT panel layout with the added knob. Fast-follow (v0.3.1): tape-breathing modulation noise, retire the AGE LFO tab, tune the mapping.
